name: review-strict
description: Strict, repo-adaptive PR / branch / diff reviewer — multi-agent, adversarially-verified code review at staff-engineer rigor (correctness, security, architecture, tests, migration safety). Adapts to each repo's own rules (AGENTS.md, CLAUDE.md, .claude/skills). Archives a project-named report inside the repo by default; English by default, both configurable via env vars. Independent of any spec pipeline.
